meaning: v.(使)气恼,(使)焦躁,(使)忿怒n.麻烦的事物,怨恨,触怒
examples: The unsolicited ads appear prominently on the screen and are a pet peeve for many users.
This is a pet peeve of mine.
I have a particular pet peeve about an analysis-level document that mentions "the system."
It also explains all the ludonarritive dissonance (another pet peeve of mine) in Tomb Raider.
Of course, if you read the blog, you know this is a pet peeve of mine.
